Metadata.Title: Dead Nation: Apocalypse Edition
Metadata.Name: 60 FPS
Metadata.Note: Unlocks 60 FPS and keeps game speed in sync.
Metadata.Author: cuesta4

Metadata.Title: Dead Nation: Apocalypse Edition
Metadata.Name: Balanced Lighting
Metadata.Note: Trims a few lighting passes with little visual impact.
Metadata.Author: cuesta4

Metadata.Title: Dead Nation: Apocalypse Edition
Metadata.Name: Reduced Auxiliary Rendering
Metadata.Note: Skips an auxiliary render pass for a small performance gain.
Metadata.Author: cuesta4
